CustomField.formula: IF(NOT(ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, 'New') || ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, 'For Owner Review') || ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, 'Wait / Hold')), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Last_Payment_Date__c)), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Insolvency_Date__c)) && (Last_Payment_Date__c + 30) > Insolvency_Date__c, Insolvency_Date__c, Last_Payment_Date__c + 30), IF(NOT(ISPICKVAL(Client_Identifier__c, 'Canadian Tire')) && NOT(ISBLANK(Account_Open_date__c)), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Insolvency_Date__c)) && (Account_Open_date__c + 30) > Insolvency_Date__c, Insolvency_Date__c, Account_Open_date__c + 30), IF(ISPICKVAL(Client_Identifier__c, 'Canadian Tire') && NOT(ISBLANK(Charge_Off_Date__c)), ADDMONTHS(Charge_Off_Date__c, -7), IF(NOT(ISPICKVAL(Client_Identifier__c, 'Canadian Tire')) && NOT(ISBLANK(Acknowledgement_date__c)), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Insolvency_Date__c)) && (Acknowledgement_date__c + 30) > Insolvency_Date__c, Insolvency_Date__c, Acknowledgement_date__c + 30), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Judgement_Date__c)), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Insolvency_Date__c)), Insolvency_Date__c, Judgement_Date__c + 30), IF(ISPICKVAL(Client_Identifier__c, 'Canadian Tire'), IF(ISBLANK(Account_Open_date__c), ADDMONTHS(TODAY(), -7), IF(ADDMONTHS(TODAY(), -7) > (Account_Open_date__c + 30), ADDMONTHS(TODAY(), -7), (Account_Open_date__c + 30))), null)))))), null)
CustomField.label: Debt Due As Of Date
